title: "Bengal has vibrant artistic tradition since ancient times:" Defence Minister Rajnath Singh at GRSE
description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh on Thursday lauded West Bengal's rich cultural heritage, emphasising that the state has nurtured a vibrant and distinguished artistic tradition since ancient times.

title: From Ancient Rome to Modern Investment: The Full Spectrum of Numismatics Under One Roof
description: The difference between finding a collectible coin and discovering its true story often comes down to having the right resources at your fingertips. For collectors and investors in Northwest Indiana, that means access to everything from ancient currency to modern...

title: Ancient trees shelter hundreds of hidden fungal species underground - Earth.com
description: Ancient trees shelter hundreds of hidden fungal species underground Earth.com

title: 3.67-Million-Year-Old ‘Little Foot’ Gets New Face Reconstruction, Linking Fossil to East African Hominins
description: Learn how advanced scanning and 3D reconstruction revealed the face of the Little Foot fossil and new insights into Australopithecus and early human evolution in Africa.

title: The travertine quarries that built ancient Rome are carving rock for a new generation of temples
description: TIVOLI, Italy (AP) — Long ago, when Romans wanted to build a new temple, they would head to the nearby quarries of Tivoli, chisel out blocks of porous rock called lapis tiburtinus — now known as travertine — and float...
